query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.phone,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'delivered' THEN o.price ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalSpent
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customerId
WHERE c.id = 1530073
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.phone;
